system.description:
Even the fiercest of prey is weak in isolation,

while the pack has strength in numbers.

LEVEL 3

Prey for the Pack. (1/encounter) Designate your quarry as Prey. When you hit your Prey in melee, your allies gain advantage on attacks against it until the start of your next turn.

Lead the Hunt. While leading your party, both you and your allies roll Stealth with advantage.

LEVEL 7

The Lion's Share. When your Prey dies, gain WIL+LVL temp HP.

LEVEL 11

Scent of Blood. Gain both benefits of Hunter's Mark against Bloodied Prey.

LEVEL 15

Ferocious Takedown. The hunt never ends. If you kill your Prey with Final Takedown, gain another use of Prey for the Pack.
